desc: Selects elements where Revit MEP system type/classification matches the requested text.
summary: Selects elements where Revit MEP system type/classification matches the requested text. Checks BuiltInParameter.RBS_SYSTEM_CLASSIFICATION_PARAM, piping/duct/electrical system type params, MEPCurve system names, FamilyInstance connector system types, and ElectricalSystem info. Uses SelectByFamilyNameCommand.BuildFamilyTypeBreakdown for result summary. Called by CommandExecutor when Claude invokes execute_command. Related: SelectByServiceTypeCommand for custom "Service Type" parameter search, SelectByParameterCommand for generic deep parameter search.
usecase: Select all Domestic Hot Water elements before tagging. Select all Supply Air duct elements for a coordination check. Select all elements in a specific electrical circuit type.
notfor: Selecting by custom "Service Type" parameter (use SelectByServiceTypeCommand). Generic deep parameter search across all fields (use SelectByParameterCommand). Simple category selection (use SelectByCategoryCommand).
precondition: Active document and view must be available. Model must contain MEP elements with system assignments.
postcondition: Revit selection is replaced with matched element IDs. Returns JSON with systemType, scope, totalSearched, totalSelected, and breakdown.
logictree: check: parameters.systemType → required, fail if emptycheck: parameters.scope == "model" → search entire modeldefault: search current view onlyiterate: each element → extract system classification text → contains match

outputs.name: Summary
outputs.description: Selection summary with counts and breakdown

preprompts: Selecting elements by MEP system type...
Searching for system type matches across elements...
Looking for elements in the specified system...
thinkingsteps: Checking connector and MEP system assignments...
successprompts: Selected {totalSelected} elements with system type matching "{systemType}" from {scope}
failureprompts: Could not select by system type: {error}
